interface.longDescription: Discover Zumba® classes that fit your schedule, location, and fitness goals. Browse available classes and their details to find options near you. Whether you’re looking for an in-person, high-energy workout, a beginner-friendly livestream session, or a video-on-demand option, Zumba® makes it easy to go from searching to dancing in just a few clicks.
defaultPrompt: Are there any Zumba classes in New York tomorrow
